title: ocimum lamiifolium
intro: Ocimum lamiifolium, also known as Indian borage or Mexican mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory problems. Ocimum lamiifolium can be prepared as teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine and culinary applications.
